title: Cheese Delight
description: A fresh, crumbly, romantic Ukrainian dish featuring ricotta cheese and a unique fermentation process that is kosher-friendly.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the ricotta cheese.
If using a fermentation agent, add it now. Mix thoroughly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a lid, making sure it seals well.
Place in a warm area (around 25°C/77°F) for 3-6 hours, depending on preference and temperature. The mixture will thicken and ferment slightly.
Garnish with herbs and spices before serving.
